macro.title: A common-sense approach to housing affordability
macro.what: Our elected leaders have a unique opportunity to strengthen small businesses, sustain critical industries, combat inflation in the housing market, and make homeownership more accessible for millions of Americans
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Social Security COLA forecast for 2027 jumps to 3.9% in response to rising inflation
macro.what: The average monthly benefit for retired workers is projected to rise from $2,081.16 to $2,162.33, based on April 2026 figures.
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: Iran Tensions, Not Economic Data, Are Driving Mortgage Rates This Week
macro.what: This Week In A Nutshell: Rates are likely to move more on headlines out of Iran than on economic data
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

housing.title: Independent single-family rental owners insulated from broader market trends
housing.what: Independent single-family rental owners remain insulated from rental market concessions and institutional investor pressures, according to TurboTenant.
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.

housing.title: Google brings real estate listings back to mobile search
housing.what: Real estate listings are back in Google mobile search in select cities, powered by HouseCanary, with CRMLS and eXp feeds.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Zillow seeks injunction as MRED threatens data feed cutoff
housing.what: Zillow seeks an injunction as MRED threatens to suspend IDX and VOW feeds May 19 over listing display and licensing rules.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: The battle for listings: How brokerages are reclaiming their data
housing.what: MLS leaders and brokers weigh syndication and listing control, governance and AI usage rights as listing data becomes a revenue engine for platforms.
housing.why: Inventory and velocity drive pricing power and volume.
housing.market: Rising inventory/DOM tilts to buyers; tight supply supports prices.

housing.title: Builder confidence remains subdued; suppliers eye price hikes
housing.what: NAHB HMI increased 3 points to 37 in May, but sentiment remains negative as affordability limits demand and incentives persist
housing.why: Supply pipeline sets future inventory and construction activity.
housing.market: Stronger pipeline aids suppliers; oversupply later can weigh on pricing.

housing.title: The Price Point: What $400,000 Buys in These Hot U.S. Neighborhoods
housing.what: In this edition of The Price Point—a weekly series where Redfin data journalists explore current housing inventory across a rotating combination of budgets and metro areas—we’re looking at some of the hottest real estate markets in the country, according to Redfin’s latest analysis
housing.why: Price trend signals wealth effects and buyer/seller power.
housing.market: Firm prices help builder margins; softness hits comps and sentiment.

housing.title: Just Listed in Virginia: A One-of-a-Kind Estate That’s Part Home, Part Event Venue, Part Airbnb

housing.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: Ginnie Mae’s Joseph Gormley sounds the alarm on ‘risk-layered’ FHA portfolios
notables.what: Ginnie Mae removed TPP loans from delinquency counts, expects cures to improve and ramps up loan-level transfers to boost liquidity.

notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: FHA turns attention to the ‘flipping rule’ and AVMs
notables.what: FHA signals push to repeal its 90-day anti-flipping rule and update AVMs, while new loss-mitigation rules are tied to $2 billion in savings.
notables.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
notables.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

notables.title: ONE Sotheby’s International Realty expands into New Jersey
